description: Refuses documents declaring a higher major openbindings version than the tool supports. While the spec is pre-1.0 (major version 0), this refusal extends to higher minor versions, per §13.1.
notes: Tests assume the SDK under test supports a version range bounded below `999.x` for major-version refusal cases, and bounded below `0.999.x` for pre-1.0 minor-version refusal cases. SDK conformance to OBI-T-04 is independent of which specific version the SDK supports; the test asserts the refusal behavior on documents declaring versions higher than any plausible SDK release in this version family. Lower-version cases are not tested because OBI-T-04 does not mandate a specific behavior for documents declaring a lower minor than the SDK supports.

tests.description: document declares the current spec version (SDK should accept assuming it supports 0.2.x)
document declares a major version higher than any plausible SDK supports
document declares a far-future major version with non-zero minor
pre-1.0 document declares a higher minor than any plausible SDK supports (per §13.1 finer-granularity rule)
pre-1.0 document declares a higher minor with a patch component
post-1.0 forward-compat: document declares a same-major-higher-minor version (SDK supporting major 1 should accept per §13.1)
